prose:
**Pyridine Fukui reactivity result** — computed with chemkit `fukui-reactivity` using DFT tier `standard` with explicit functional/basis **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (`--method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp`), **gas phase** because no solvent was set, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`; this Fukui calculation used Mulliken charges from PySCF-style DFT charge states at that input geometry. Parent: neutral singlet; cation: charge +1, multiplicity 2; anion: charge -1, multiplicity 2. No `warnings` array was returned by the tool. Engine integrity verdict: `trustworthy: true`.

Headline result: most electrophilic site by f+ is atom 1, N, with **f+ = 0.48422572**. Most nucleophilic site by f− is atom 4, C, with **f− = 0.1182626**.

Per-atom Fukui descriptors, atom labels are 1-based in the input order:

| atom | element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | N | 0.48422572 | 0.064122671 | 0.2741742 | 0.42010305 |
| 2 | C | 0.32447227 | 0.0061877146 | 0.16532999 | 0.31828455 |
| 3 | C | 0.14032093 | 0.11823139 | 0.12927616 | 0.022089541 |
| 4 | C | 0.14039586 | 0.1182626 | 0.12932923 | 0.022133259 |
| 5 | C | 0.29962626 | 0.11206595 | 0.20584611 | 0.18756031 |
| 6 | C | 0.29947707 | 0.11200985 | 0.20574346 | 0.18746722 |
| 7 | H | -0.1415132 | 0.08284851 | -0.029332344 | -0.22436171 |
| 8 | H | -0.1336841 | 0.098179487 | -0.017752309 | -0.23186359 |
| 9 | H | -0.13365905 | 0.09818226 | -0.017738396 | -0.23184131 |

| 11 | H | -0.13984545 | 0.094949479 | -0.022447986 | -0.23479493 |

Reproducibility: exact chemkit command returned by the engine was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout json /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmplcxna2eh/live.json`. Plot path returned: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-192033_pyridine_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. The tool result did not include the live `.out` log path, so I cannot name that path without guessing.
